command:
echo "=== HOP 3: cloudflared tunnel ingress config on .191 (the DESTINATION mapping) ==="
# In token mode, routes come from CF dashboard but cloudflared logs show what it dials
sudo journalctl -u cloudflared -n 50 --no-pager 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "ingress|sakura|config|8080|originService" | tail -15
echo "--- cloudflared metrics endpoint (shows config) ---"
curl -s http://localhost:38483/ 2>/dev/null | head -5 || echo "metrics not on 38483, finding port..."
# Find cloudflared metrics port
METRICS=$(sudo ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep cloudflared | grep -oE ':[0-9]+' | tr -d ':' | head -1)
echo "cloudflared listening ports:"
sudo ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep cloudflared

echo ""
echo "=== HOP 4: prepare tcpdump on .202:8080 ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 jose@192.168.0.202 \
  "which tcpdump 2>/dev/null || (sudo apt-get install -y tcpdump -q 2>&1 | tail -1); echo 'tcpdump ready'"

echo ""
echo "=== Confirm .202:8080 listener still up ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 jose@192.168.0.202 \
  "sudo ss -tlnp | grep 8080"

echo ""
echo "=== Re-enable .201 replica (it wasn't the problem) ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 jose@192.168.0.201 \
  "sudo systemctl enable cloudflared && sudo systemctl start cloudflared && echo '.201 replica back'"
